description: To investigate a quality trend, an engineer needs to find all finished products that were made using a specific lot of raw material.

nodes.task_description: Enter the lot number of the raw material to be traced.

expected_outcome.value: Agent enters the specific lot number into the system.

nodes.task_description: Execute a 'where-used' search to find all work orders that consumed this lot.

expected_outcome.value: The system returns a list of work orders where the material lot was used.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of the final product serial numbers associated with those work orders.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a comprehensive list of all finished goods potentially affected.
